_note: Xahau Genesis governance / network-reward constants. Reward accrual is governed by the Genesis Hook; exact emission params are read LIVE from the account reward fields (RewardAccumulator/RewardLgrFirst/RewardLgrLast) and the governance hook state. compute_reward applies the documented monthly-compounding model and labels fidelity.
caveat: rewardDelayLedgers and rewardRateMonthly are documented defaults; the live Genesis hook state is authoritative and may differ. Verify with governance_state / live account fields before relying on a figure.
_unitCorrection: rewardDelayLedgers is legacy-misnamed (kept for compatibility): the genesis reward hook's RD parameter is SECONDS, not ledgers (reward.c gates on ledger_last_time() - RewardTime >= RD). 2,600,000 s ~= 30.09 days. Verified against Xahau/xahaud hook/genesis/reward.c 2026-06-11.

genesisHookStateKeys.note: 32-byte hook state keys, ASCII right-aligned zero-left-padded, in the genesis account's zero namespace; values are 8-byte little-endian XFL.
